mapper.select: /* ItemAsrtInfoMapper.xml selectErpAsrtInfoList */ SELECT TRN_ID , MIN(SND_ROW) OVER (PARTITION BY TRN_ID) AS MINROW , MAX(SND_ROW) OVER (PARTITION BY TRN_ID) AS MAXROW , ASSORTICKEY AS ASRTKEY , MASICICKEY AS ASRTREPKEY , ICNM AS ASRTNM , SMLCTG , QTY , ICIMGURL , ICCOLOR , ICDESIGN , ICCHRT , 'ERP' AS INSERTSYSTM FROM ( SELECT * FROM TORDER_EAI_ASRT_BATCH WHERE SND_PROC_TYP IN ('N','E','R') AND SND_DATE BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} ORDER BY TRN_ID, SND_ROW ) AS sub_t LIMIT #{sendCnt}
mapper.update: /* ItemAsrtInfoMapper.xml - updateTodayTarget */ UPDATE TORDER_WMS_ASRT_BATCH SET SENDSTATUS = 'Y' , UPDATEDATE = TO_CHAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') , UPDATEURKEY = 'batch asrt info' WHERE REQDATE = TO_CHAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,'YYYYMMDD') AND ASRTREPKEY = #{asrtrepkey}
